summary: Build is ready. Formal review is the canonical next stage.

recommended_side_skills.label: Run `/design-review`
recommended_side_skills.description: Do a focused visual audit on a design-bearing implementation before formal review.
recommended_side_skills.visibility_reason: S2 ships first multi-surface design work (WS-4: four-tab IA + marginalia rail primitive + Gemini OAuth flow). /design-consultation is the contract path. Checklist-backed rationale: design review/design-checklist.md - S2 ships first multi-surface design work: WS-4 four-tab IA, marginalia rail primitive, status-bar pulse animation, AI Preferences panel, OAuth-flow state machine.; accessibility review/design-checklist.md - OAuth browser handoff plus keyboard activation across the AI Preferences panel and four-tab IA require accessibility coverage.
recommended_side_skills.why_this_skill: Use this because the verification matrix ties this run to the design and accessibility checklists.

evidence_signal.summary: Verification matrix surfaced design and accessibility checklist coverage for this recommendation.
